violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed dried food inside both mini fridges.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed straws and a paper towel in hand sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed acoustic ceiling tiles in food prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed vent over food prep table is very dirty.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed damaged ceiling tiles in food prep area.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in freezer in food prep area.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Observed dinner ware not inverted during storage.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — ---Handwash lavatory was not supplied with waste receptacle as needed.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed ceiling is acoustic tile which is neither smooth, nor cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed ceiling and wall by grill need to be cleaned.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items . -Observed broken light shields over food prep area.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
